## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? Link any related issues with `Closes #N`. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation / chore / dependency update

## Test plan

- [ ] Added/updated vitest specs for the changed behavior
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Manually exercised the CLI (paste the command + output if relevant)

## Checklist

- [ ] `package.json` version bumped per semver (patch/minor/major)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a new entry
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-facing surface changed
